subcodes.first_line: O thou who rememberest the exhortations and counsels, whether through words or through deeds and conduct, and the fragrances of divine mysteries [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ذاکر متذکر مواعظ و نصائح گهی بگفتار باشد و گهی برفتار و کردار و نفحات اسرار
subcodes.subjects: @words vs deeds, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @martyrs and martyrdom
